alerts.title: Iran expands strikes beyond Persian Gulf; targets Kuwait airport, killing 1 and wounding 63
alerts.summary: Iran launched coordinated attacks on Kuwait airport and Bahrain on 6 June, killing one and injuring 63 at Kuwait facility per incidents feed (Guardian, CBS News). Attack marks escalation beyond US-Iran direct exchange to broader Gulf infrastructure targeting. CENTCOM reports 7 ballistic missiles fired; 6 intercepted, 1 failed to reach target. Signals Iranian willingness to strike civilian infrastructure of regional allies during ceasefire talks.

alerts.title: Iran nuclear breakout window remains 1-2 weeks; IAEA unable to verify enriched uranium stockpile
alerts.summary: IAEA reports Iran maintains 60% U-235 enrichment with ~1-2 week weapons-grade breakout timeline per global_metrics nuclear headlines (Reuters, JNS, NYT). UN inspectors unable to verify enriched uranium inventories since fighting began, creating critical intelligence gap. IAEA charges Iran with politicizing nuclear assessments. Nuclear advancement continues parallel to active military operations without verification oversight.

alerts.title: Israel continues strikes in Lebanon despite renewed US-brokered ceasefire agreement
alerts.summary: Israeli military maintains offensive operations in southern Lebanon and Beirut region despite new ceasefire accord per incidents feed (Al Jazeera, BBC, Jerusalem Post). At least 10+ killed in recent strikes including 3 Lebanese soldiers and civilians at Gaza wedding. Hezbollah formally rejected ceasefire terms with Iranian backing. Israeli strikes undermine diplomatic efforts and risk wider regional escalation.

alerts.title: Houthis coordinate with Al-Shabaab; escalate Red Sea shipping attacks with missiles
alerts.summary: Middle East Spectator reports Houthis and Al-Shabaab conspiring to choke Red Sea maritime routes per telegram feed. Houthis launched missile attack on Red Sea vessel and conducted secondary strike on Israel, opening new operational front. Telegram posts show ~35-40K combined views on Red Sea threat. Escalation threatens global shipping and signals proxy coordination against US interests.

alerts.title: Iran escalates cyber operations as kinetic conflict expands; preview of hybrid warfare tactics
alerts.summary: Global_metrics cyber headlines highlight Iran's cyber playbook convergence with China's tactics and escalating threat to US critical infrastructure per CSIS and Resecurity analysis. Cyber operations running parallel to kinetic strikes in Persian Gulf and Red Sea. Indicates Iran pursuing multi-domain warfare strategy combining conventional, drone, missile, and cyber attacks simultaneously.

analysis_note: US-Iran conflict has entered active kinetic phase with Iran expanding strikes into Gulf ally territory; nuclear breakout window narrows to 1-2 weeks amid IAEA verification blackout; Israel undermines ceasefire diplomacy with continued Lebanon strikes; proxy escalation (Houthis, Hezbollah) and emerging cyber coordination signal multi-domain Iranian strategy.
